title: ジャパンカップの後に・怒涛王のキモチ

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I have lost to Doto... For me to have been
defeated by her, despite my awakening... What a
joyous achievement!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Yet, Doto's heart is set—not to be my enemy...
but a mutual motivator. An eternal rival, it is!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Rivalry—something which a ruler requires—will
help me achieve the power to overthrow the
Golden Generation! With this settled, the stage is
ready.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The Golden Generation awaits at the final
battleground... the Arima Kinen!
